<!-- Source: HLD §3.2 query pipeline message flow. Numbered messages between real HLD components only. -->

# Communication Diagram — Query Message Flow

```mermaid
graph LR
    SPA["SPA / Enterprise client"]
    API["API Gateway"]
    Cache["TOC Cache"]
    PG["PostgreSQL"]
    Router["Router Node"]
    Ret["Retrieve Node"]
    QD["Qdrant"]
    Gen["Generate Node"]

    SPA -->|"1: POST /v1/answer"| API
    API -->|"2: getTOC(doc_id)"| Cache
    Cache -->|"2.1: loadSections (miss)"| PG
    API -->|"3: route(query, TOC)"| Router
    Router -->|"4: RouterOutput"| API
    API -->|"5: retrieve(section_id IN ...)"| Ret
    Ret -->|"6: search(filter)"| QD
    QD -->|"6.1: chunks"| Ret
    Ret -->|"7: context"| Gen
    Gen -->|"8: SSE tokens + final"| API
    API -->|"9: stream"| SPA
```

> Message numbering reflects the HLD §3.2 call order. For `/v1/route`, messages stop at step 4 (RouterOutput); steps 5-9 are the `/v1/answer`-only path.
